context.narrative: NQ is in a positive gamma regime (Net GEX +2.17M of 11.73M total), where dealer hedging tends to dampen volatility and mean-revert price — buying dips, selling rallies. 0DTE gamma is negligible (~5.4% of total), so the all-expiration structure leads. Spot 31,193.38 sits within the 30,246.12–31,193.38 session range, in the recovery zone: holding above 31,100 and pressing the 31,200–31,300 decision cluster overhead. Acceptance through 31,200–31,300 opens a push toward 31,500 and the 32,000 ceiling; rejection rotates back to 31,100, and losing 30,490 reactivates the downside ladder. Trade acceptance and failure, not direction — reactions at these levels are likely but not guaranteed.
context.zero_dte_weight: 0DTE GEX is ~5.4% of total — all-exp levels are authoritative for this session.

decision_tree: 31,100 holds → decision cluster 31,200–31,300 is in play
Lose 31,100 → live invalidation 30,490 back in play
Trade acceptance and failure — not direction.

bullish.execution: Hold + reclaim only. Scale out at each target. No chasing into overhead without acceptance.

bearish.trigger: Rejection at cluster 31,200–31,300 or loss of 31,100
bearish.execution: Failed-recovery short only. Do not press downside while price holds above 31,100.

chop.invalidation: Clean acceptance outside the range (either side)
chop.execution: Rotation / fakeouts — no directional edge. Fade extremes only. No middle-of-range entries. Size down. Wait for resolution.

management: First target: take 50–75% off. Reduce risk immediately.
Second target: scale out further. Leave a runner.
Runner: trail stop. Let the level work.
Never let a green trade go red.
Do not hold through a completed second leg unless fresh acceptance confirms continuation.
summary: Gamma regime Positive — flows may reinforce / stabilize moves (reactions likely, not guaranteed).
Directional bias from raw Net DEX: +7.40B.
Active decision cluster 31,200–31,300: acceptance opens recovery toward 31,500; failure rotates to 31,100 and risks the 30,490 invalidation.

playbook.name: Mean-reversion — fade extremes
playbook.why: Positive gamma (+2.17M) has dealers hedging against the move (buy dips, sell rallies), dampening volatility and favouring rotation over trend.
playbook.how: Fade rejections at the 31,200–31,300 cluster; buy dips that hold 31,100; scale toward the range midpoint. No middle-of-range entries.

playbook.name: Decision-cluster acceptance / rejection
playbook.why: Price is in the recovery zone below the 31,200–31,300 fulcrum — the session resolves here.
playbook.how: Acceptance above 31,200–31,300 → long the recovery; rejection → fade back to 31,100. Trade acceptance and failure, not direction.

playbook.name: Range rotation (value-area fades)
playbook.why: Balance between 31,100 support and the 31,200–31,300 ceiling — treat these as value-area edges.
playbook.how: Fade the extremes only, size down in the middle, wait for acceptance or a clean break to flip bias.

playbook.name: Reclaim / failed-breakdown long
playbook.why: In a stabilising regime, dips that reclaim 31,100 tend to recover toward the cluster.
playbook.how: Long on hold + reclaim of 31,100; target the 31,200–31,300 cluster; out on losing 31,100.

playbook.name: Acceptance-through breakout
playbook.why: Positive gamma resists breakouts, so only clean acceptance is tradeable — fewer but higher-quality continuations.
playbook.how: Long only on accepted candles above 31,200–31,300 → 31,500 → 32,000. No chasing without acceptance.

strategy_library.name: Mean-reversion (fade extremes)
strategy_library.note: Fade pushes into walls; buy dips / sell rallies; no middle-of-range entries.

strategy_library.name: Momentum / breakout
strategy_library.note: Trade accepted breakouts with trend; trail runners; do not fade.

strategy_library.name: Range rotation (VAH / VAL / POC)
strategy_library.note: Fade value-area edges; target POC; size down mid-range.

strategy_library.name: Acceptance / rejection at the decision cluster
strategy_library.note: Go with clean acceptance; fade clean rejection. Acceptance & failure, not direction.

strategy_library.name: Reclaim / failed-breakdown long
strategy_library.when: Dip reclaims support in positive gamma
strategy_library.note: Hold + reclaim long; invalidation on losing the support.

strategy_library.name: Failed-recovery short
strategy_library.when: Rejection at resistance or loss of support
strategy_library.note: Short failed pushes only; don't press while price holds above support.

strategy_library.name: Explosive-zone scalp (blind spots / LVN)
strategy_library.when: Price enters a thin / low-liquidity band
strategy_library.note: Expect a fast move through the gap; scalp the acceleration with tight risk.

strategy_library.name: VWAP reversion / trend
strategy_library.note: Fade extensions back to VWAP in balance; ride the VWAP slope in trend.

strategy_library.name: Opening-range breakout
strategy_library.note: Trade acceptance beyond the OR with the regime; fade fakeouts under positive gamma.

strategy_library.name: Liquidity sweep / stop-run reversal
strategy_library.note: Fade the sweep back into range on absorption / CLC confirmation.

strategy_library.name: Absorption / CLC entry
strategy_library.when: At a key level with delta / CVD divergence
strategy_library.note: Enter when aggressive flow is absorbed (DeepDOM / iceberg) and price holds.

strategy_library.name: Pin / theta into the close
strategy_library.note: Expect compression near the largest GEX strikes; don't force direction into the pin.

context.narrative: ES is in a positive gamma regime (Net GEX +25.20M of 491.85M total), where dealer hedging tends to dampen volatility and mean-revert price — buying dips, selling rallies. 0DTE gamma is negligible (~1.2% of total), so the all-expiration structure leads. Spot 30,584.25 sits within the 7,501.51–7,639.99 session range, in the recovery zone: holding above 7,675 and pressing the not available decision cluster overhead. Trade acceptance and failure, not direction — reactions at these levels are likely but not guaranteed.
context.zero_dte_weight: 0DTE GEX is ~1.2% of total — all-exp levels are authoritative for this session.

decision_tree: 7,675 holds → decision cluster not available is in play
Accept above not available → opens not available
Above not available → recovery extends to 7,700
Fail at not available → rotation back to 7,675
Lose 7,675 → live invalidation 7,545 back in play
Trade acceptance and failure — not direction.

bullish.trigger: Hold 7,675 + acceptance above cluster not available
bullish.execution: Hold + reclaim only. Scale out at each target. No chasing into overhead without acceptance.

bearish.trigger: Rejection at cluster not available or loss of 7,675
bearish.invalidation: Clean acceptance back above not available
bearish.execution: Failed-recovery short only. Do not press downside while price holds above 7,675.

chop.trigger: Oscillates between 7,675 and cluster not available
chop.invalidation: Clean acceptance outside the range (either side)
chop.execution: Rotation / fakeouts — no directional edge. Fade extremes only. No middle-of-range entries. Size down. Wait for resolution.

management: First target: take 50–75% off. Reduce risk immediately.
Second target: scale out further. Leave a runner.
Runner: trail stop. Let the level work.
Never let a green trade go red.
Do not hold through a completed second leg unless fresh acceptance confirms continuation.
summary: Gamma regime Positive — flows may reinforce / stabilize moves (reactions likely, not guaranteed).
Directional bias from raw Net DEX: +72.86B.
Active decision cluster not available: acceptance opens recovery toward not available; failure rotates to 7,675 and risks the 7,545 invalidation.
Priority levels: not available cluster · 7,545 invalidation · 7,400 floor.
